mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books (title, isbn, publication_year, author_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{isbn}, #{publicationYear}, #{author.id})
mapper.select: SELECT b.*, a.name as author_name, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN authors a ON b.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN book_categories bc ON b.id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON bc.category_id = c.id

SELECT b.*, a.name as author_name, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name FROM books b LEFT JOIN authors a ON b.author_id = a.id LEFT JOIN book_categories bc ON b.id = bc.book_id LEFT JOIN categories c ON bc.category_id = c.id WHERE b.id = #{id}
